भारतीय ररज़र्व बैंक

RESERVE BANK OF INDIA
RBI/DOR/2025-26/241
DOR.ACC.REC.No.160/21.04.018/2025-26 November 28, 2025
Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Financial Statements: Presentation
and Disclosures) Directions, 2025 (Updated as on May 18, 2026)
Table of Contents
Chapter-I Preliminary ............................................................................................................
enriched_requirements.object: Contents Chapter-I Preliminary

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks -
Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Local Area Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
enriched_requirements.object: Area Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In terms of the provisions of Section 29 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (BR
Act, 1949), a bank shall in respect of all business transacted by it prepare a
balance sheet and profit and loss account as on the last working day of the year
or the period, as the case may be, in the Forms set out in the Third Schedule of
the BR Act, 1949.
enriched_requirements.object: business transacted by it prepare a balance sheet and profit and loss account as on the last working day of the year or the period,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall follow the general instructions for the compilation of balance sheet
and profit and loss account as specified in subparagraph (1) below.
enriched_requirements.object: for the compilation of balance sheet and profit and loss account as specified in subparagraph (1) below

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall
ensure strict compliance with the Accounting Standards notified under the
Companies (Accounting Standards) Rules, 2021, as amended from time to time,
subject to Directions / Guidelines issued by the RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: the Accounting Standards notified under the Companies (Accounting Standards) Rules, 2021, as amended from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Note: Mere mention of an activity, transaction, or item in instructions for
compilation does not imply that it is permitted, and the bank shall refer to the
extant statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility
or otherwise of an activity or transaction.
enriched_requirements.object: statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an activity or transaction

whether the payment is due or not, shall be

under the head 'deposits' and hence all

(including provisions)'.

expenses, etc., shall be included under this
head.

In case any particular item under this
head exceeds one per cent of the total
income
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case any particular item under this
head exceeds one per cent of the total
income, particulars shall be given in the

A bank shall, at the minimum, furnish the following information in the 'Notes to
Accounts'.
enriched_requirements.object: furnish the following information in the 'Notes to Accounts'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall note that mere mention of an activity, transaction or
item in the disclosure template does not imply that it is permitted.
enriched_requirements.object: of an activity, transaction or item in the disclosure template does not imply that it is permitted

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall
refer to the extant statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the
permissibility or otherwise of an activity or transaction.
enriched_requirements.object: statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an activity or transaction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall disclose
comparative information in respect of the previous period for all amounts reported
in the current period's financial statements.
enriched_requirements.object: respect of the previous period for all amounts reported in the current period's financial statements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the bank shall include
comparative information for narrative and descriptive information if it is relevant
to understanding the current period's financial statements.
enriched_requirements.object: narrative and descriptive information if it is relevant to understanding the current period's financial statements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

liability management.

(ii) Draw down from Reserves: Suitable disclosures mentioning the amount and
the rationale for withdrawal shall be made regarding any draw down from
reserves.

Investments outside India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For a bank, the Total under column 3 shall match with the sum of total of Investments included
under the following categories in Schedule 8 to the balance sheet:
a) Investment in India in
i) Shares ii) Debentures and Bonds iii) Subsidiaries and / or Joint Ventures iv) Others
b) Investment outside India in (where applicable)
i) Government securities (including local authorities)
ii) Subsidiaries and / or joint ventures abroad

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Amounts reported under columns 4, 5, 6 and 7 above may not be mutually exclusive.

Notes:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Asset quality
Note:
1) While making disclosures in audited annual financial statements, a bank should invariably provide the figures for both the current and previous year to facilitate comparison.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Amount of Technical write-off should be certified by statutory auditors.
enriched_requirements.object: auditors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 3) To the extent that floating provisions have not been reckoned for Tier 2 capital, they may be netted off from Gross NPAs to arrive at Net NPAs.

conditions: If a bank does not have any overseas assets

Note: If a bank does not have any overseas assets, NPAs and revenues, in both the current and previous
year it may omit this disclosure.

Adjusted (notional) Net Profit after Tax (PAT) for the year ended March 31, 20XX after considering the divergence in provisioning
Note: While making disclosures in audited annual financial statements, a bank
should invariably provide the figures for both the current and previous year to
facilitate comparison.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Note: As regards NFB credit limits, the bank shall be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area
Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall come
into force from April 1, 2026, or from any earlier date as decided by a bank as per its internal policy
("effective date").
enriched_requirements.object: April 1, 2026, or from any earlier date as decided by a bank as per its internal policy ("effective date")

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Extension of any new NFB facility and renewal of an existing NFB facility after the
effective date, shall be governed in terms of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: of these Directions

conditions: If a bank has no exposure to country risk in both the current and previous year
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All existing NFB facilities extended/
Note: A bank that is not required by the listing requirements or otherwise to publish quarterly / half-yearly
Note: If a bank has no exposure to country risk in both the current and previous year, it may omit
disclosure of the table while mentioning that it has no exposure to country risk.

Percentage of advances to twenty largest borrowers to total advances of the bank

derivative exposures where applicable.

The sanctioned limits or outstanding, whichever are higher, shall
be reckoned.

conditions:
where there is no scope for re-drawal of any

However, in the case of fully drawn term loans, where there is no scope for re-drawal of any
portion of the sanctioned limit, a bank may reckon the outstanding as the credit exposure

(iii) Concentration of exposures**
(Amount in ₹ crore) Particulars Current Year Previous Year
Total exposure to the twenty largest borrowers / customers
Percentage of exposures to the twenty largest borrowers / customers to the total exposure of the bank on borrowers / customers
**Exposures shall be computed as per applicable RBI regulation.

(ii) Forward rate agreement / Interest rate swap
(Amount in ₹ crore) Particulars Current Year Previous Year i) The notional principal of swap agreements
ii) Losses which would be incurred if counterparties failed to fulfil
their obligations under the agreements
iii) Collateral required by the bank upon entering into swaps
iv) Concentration of credit risk arising from the swaps (for
example, exposures to particular industries, or swaps with

v) The fair value of the swap book

or commitments, the fair value shall be the estimated amount
that the bank would receive or pay to terminate the swap
agreements as on the balance sheet date.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For a trading swap
the fair value shall be its mark to market value)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The net position shall be shown either under asset or liability, as the case may be, for each type
of derivatives.
enriched_requirements.object: asset or liability, as the case may be, for each type of derivatives

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may adopt the Current Exposure Method on Measurement of Credit Exposure of
Derivative Products as per extant RBI instructions.
enriched_requirements.object: Method on Measurement of Credit Exposure of Derivative Products as per extant RBI instructions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Particulars Current Year Previous Year
i) Opening balance of amounts transferred to DEA Fund
ii) Add: Amounts transferred to DEA Fund during the year
iii) Less: Amounts reimbursed by DEA Fund towards claims
iv) Closing balance of amounts transferred to DEA Fund
A bank shall specify here that the closing balance of the amount transferred to DEA Fund, as disclosed above, are also included under 'Schedule 12 - Contingent Liabilities - Other items for which the bank is contingently liable' or 'Contingent Liabilities - Others,' as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: closing balance of the amount transferred to DEA Fund, as disclosed above, are also included under 'Schedule 12 - Contingent Lia

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) Penalties imposed by the RBI under the provisions of the (i) BR Act, 1949, (ii)
Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007, and (iii) Government Securities Act,
2006 (for bouncing of SGL) shall be disclosed in the 'Notes to Accounts' to the
balance sheet in the concerned bank's next Annual Report.
enriched_requirements.object: 'Notes to Accounts' to the balance sheet in the concerned bank's next Annual Report

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) A bank shall make appropriate disclosures on the nature of the breach, number of
instances of default and the quantum of penalty imposed.
enriched_requirements.object: the nature of the breach, number of instances of default and the quantum of penalty imposed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) The defaulting participant in a reverse repo transaction shall make appropriate
disclosure on the number of instances of default as well as the quantum of penalty
paid to the RBI during the financial year.
enriched_requirements.object: the number of instances of default as well as the quantum of penalty paid to the RBI during the financial year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) A bank is required to make disclosure on remuneration of Whole Time Directors /
Chief Executive Officers / Material Risk Takers on an annual basis at the minimum,
in its Annual Financial Statements.
enriched_requirements.object: remuneration of Whole Time Directors / Chief Executive Officers / Material Risk Takers on an annual basis at the minimum, in its

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) The bank shall make the disclosures in table or chart format and make disclosures
for previous as well as the current reporting year.
enriched_requirements.object: table or chart format and make disclosures for previous as well as the current reporting year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) Further, a bank (to the extent applicable), shall disclose the following
information:
Type of disclosure

Information
Qualitative
Information relating to the composition and mandate of the Nomination and
(a)
Remuneration Committee.
enriched_requirements.object: Type of disclosure Information Qualitative Information relating to the composition and mandate of the Nomination

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It should include the nature and type of the key measures
used to take account of these risks.
enriched_requirements.object: type of the key measures used to take account of these risks

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Current
Previous
Year Quantitative
Year
Number of meetings held by the
disclosures
Nomination and Remuneration Committee
(g)
(The quantitative
during the financial year and remuneration
disclosures should only
paid to its members.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) A bank shall also disclose remuneration paid to the non-executive directors on an
annual basis at the minimum, in its Annual Financial Statements.
enriched_requirements.object: to the non-executive directors on an annual basis at the minimum, in its Annual Financial Statements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(v) Share-linked instruments should be fair valued on the date of grant by the bank
using Black-Scholes model.
enriched_requirements.object: the date of grant by the bank using Black-Scholes model

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The fair value thus arrived at should be recognised as
an expense beginning with the accounting period for which approval has been
granted.
enriched_requirements.object: expense beginning with the accounting period for which approval has been granted

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
3 Return on Assets shall be with reference to average working funds (i.e., total of assets excluding
accumulated losses, if any).
enriched_requirements.object: average working funds (i.e., total of assets excluding accumulated losses

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
4 For the purpose of computation of business per employee (deposits plus advances), inter-bank deposits
shall be excluded.

(ii) Bancassurance business: The details of fees / brokerage earned in respect of
insurance broking, agency and bancassurance business undertaken by a bank
shall be disclosed for both the current year and previous year.
enriched_requirements.object: the current year and previous year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) Marketing and distribution: A bank shall disclose the details of fees /
remuneration received in respect of the marketing and distribution function
(excluding bancassurance business) undertaken by it.
enriched_requirements.object: fees / remuneration received in respect of the marketing and distribution function (excluding bancassurance business) undertak

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) Disclosures regarding Priority Sector Lending Certificates (PSLCs): The
amount of PSLCs (category-wise) sold and purchased during the year shall be
disclosed.

(vi) Payment of DICGC Insurance Premium
2[A bank shall disclose in the annual report that 'deposit insurance premium as
applicable was paid to DICGC within the prescribed timelines'.
enriched_requirements.object: report that 'deposit insurance premium as applicable was paid to DICGC within the prescribed timelines'

conditions:
In case the bank has not
paid as per the required timelines
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the bank has not
paid as per the required timelines, the same shall also be disclosed.]

(vii) Disclosure of Letters of Comfort (LoCs) issued by banks: A bank should
disclose the full particulars of all the Letters of Comfort (LoCs) issued by it during
the year, including their assessed financial impact, as also their assessed
cumulative financial obligations under the LoCs issued by it in the past and
outstanding, in its published financial statements, as part of the 'Notes to
Accounts'.
enriched_requirements.object: of all the Letters of Comfort (LoCs) issued by it during the year, including their assessed financial impact, as also th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall adhere to following guidelines for unreconciled inter-branch account
entries.
enriched_requirements.object: for unreconciled inter-branch account entries

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(1) The bank shall segregate the credit entries outstanding for more than five years in
the inter-branch account and transfer them to a separate 'Blocked Account' which
shall be shown under 'Other Liabilities and Provisions - Others'.
enriched_requirements.object: outstanding for more than five years in the inter-branch account and transfer them to a separate 'Blocked Account' which

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Any adjustment from the Blocked Account should be permitted only with the
authorisation of two officials, one of whom should be from the Controlling / Head
Office if the amount exceeds ₹ One lakh.
enriched_requirements.object: the authorisation of two officials, one of whom should be from the Controlling / Head Office if the amount exceeds ₹ One lakh

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The balance in Blocked Account shall be reckoned as a liability for the purpose of
the maintenance of Cash Reserve Ratio (CRR) and Statutory Liquidity Ratio
(SLR).
enriched_requirements.object: liability for the purpose of the maintenance of Cash Reserve Ratio (CRR) and Statutory Liquidity Ratio (SLR)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The bank shall maintain category-wise (head-wise) accounts for various types of
transactions put through inter-branch accounts, so that the netting can be done
category-wise.
enriched_requirements.object: for various types of transactions put through inter-branch accounts, so that the netting can be done categ

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As on the balance sheet date, the bank shall segregate the debit
and credit entries remaining unreconciled for more than six months and arrive at
the net position category-wise, while also considering the balance in the Blocked
Account.
enriched_requirements.object: credit entries remaining unreconciled for more than six months and arrive at the net position category-wise, while also consid

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The net debit under all the categories of inter-branch accounts shall be aggregated
and a provision equivalent to 100 per cent of the aggregate net debit shall be made.
enriched_requirements.object: provision equivalent to 100 per cent of the aggregate net debit shall be made

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, the bank shall ensure that the net debit in one category is not set-
off against net credit in another category.
enriched_requirements.object: debit in one category is not set- off against net credit in another category

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Treatment of outstanding entries in Nostro accounts shall of a bank shall be as
under:
(1) The bank shall take steps to have a strong control over reconciliation and put in
place a system of real-time reconciliation, which provides for immediate escalation
of differences, if any.
enriched_requirements.object: be as under: (1) The bank shall take steps to have a strong control over reconciliation and put in place a system of real-time reconciliation, which provides for immediate escalation of differences

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(2) There shall be close monitoring of pending items in Nostro accounts by top
management at short intervals.
enriched_requirements.object: pending items in Nostro accounts by top management at short intervals

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) All unreconciled credit entries in Nostro accounts which are outstanding for more
than three years shall be transferred to a Blocked Account and shown as
outstanding liabilities.
enriched_requirements.object: Blocked Account and shown as outstanding liabilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The balance in the Blocked Account shall be reckoned for the purpose of CRR /
SLR.
enriched_requirements.object: purpose of CRR / SLR

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) A bank shall make 100 per cent provision in respect of all unreconciled debit entries
in the Nostro accounts, which are outstanding for more than two years.
enriched_requirements.object: provision in respect of all unreconciled debit entries in the Nostro accounts, which are outstanding for more than two years

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) A bank which, in the past, was permitted to transfer to profit and loss account
(followed by subsequent appropriation to general reserve) outstanding credit
entries of individual value less than USD 2,500 or equivalent in Nostro accounts
originated up to March 31, 2002, subject to certain conditions, shall ensure that
any future claims in respect of these entries are honoured.
enriched_requirements.object: claims in respect of these entries are honoured

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The amount appropriated to the general reserve shall not be available
for the declaration of dividend.
enriched_requirements.object: declaration of dividend

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In terms of Section 17(1) of the BR Act, 1949 a bank is required to transfer, out of
the balance of profit as disclosed in the profit and loss account, a sum equivalent
to not less than 20 per cent of such profit to Reserve Fund.
enriched_requirements.object: the balance of profit as disclosed in the profit and loss account, a sum equivalent to not less than 20 per cent of such profit to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Unless specifically allowed by extant regulations, the bank shall take prior approval
from the RBI before any appropriation is made from the Statutory Reserve or any
other reserve.
enriched_requirements.object: the RBI before any appropriation is made from the Statutory Reserve or any other reserve

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Banks are further advised that,
(1) all expenses including provisions and write-offs recognised in a period, whether
mandatory or prudential, shall be reflected in the profit and loss account for the
period as an 'above the line' item (i.e., before arriving at the net profit / loss for the
year);
enriched_requirements.object: profit and loss account for the period as an 'above the line' item (i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) draw down from reserves, with the prior approval of RBI, shall be effected only
'below the line' (i.e., after arriving at the net profit / loss for the year);
enriched_requirements.object: the line' (i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
<image>
(3) suitable disclosures shall be made of such draw down in the 'Notes on Accounts'
to the Balance Sheet.
enriched_requirements.object: draw down in the 'Notes on Accounts' to the Balance Sheet

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, the share premium account shall not be utilised for writing off the
expenses relating to the issue of debt instruments.
enriched_requirements.object: off the expenses relating to the issue of debt instruments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: For the purposes of this Direction, issue expenses shall include
registration and other regulatory fees, payments made to legal, accounting, and
other professional advisers, printing costs, and stamp duties.
enriched_requirements.object: regulatory fees, payments made to legal, accounting, and other professional advisers, printing costs, and stamp duties

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of provisioning for frauds, a bank that has reported the fraud within the
prescribed time shall have the option to make the provision for the same over a
period, not exceeding four quarters, commencing from the quarter in which the
fraud has been detected.
enriched_requirements.object: make the provision for the same over a period, not exceeding four quarters, commencing from the quarter in which the fraud has been

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where the bank chooses to provide for the fraud over two to four quarters and this
results in the full provisioning being made in more than one financial year, subject
to compliance with applicable laws, it may debit reserves other than the Statutory
Reserve by the amount remaining un-provided at the end of the financial year by
credit to provisions.
enriched_requirements.object: the Statutory Reserve by the amount remaining un-provided at the end of the financial year by credit to provisions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, it should subsequently proportionately reverse the debits to the
reserves and complete the provisioning by debiting profit and loss account, in the
successive quarters of the next financial year.
enriched_requirements.object: proportionately reverse the debits to the reserves and complete the provisioning by debiting profit and loss account, in the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where there has been delay, beyond the prescribed period, in reporting the fraud
to the RBI, the entire provisioning is required to be made at once.
enriched_requirements.object: once

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Unreconciled credit balances in any transitory account representing unclaimed
balances shall not be transferred to the profit and loss account or to any reserves.
enriched_requirements.object: profit and loss account or to any reserves

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make provisions for DTL on the Special Reserve created under
Section 36(1)(viii) of Income Tax Act, 1961.
enriched_requirements.object: on the Special Reserve created under Section 36(1)(viii) of Income Tax Act, 1961

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that balance sheet and profit and loss account reflect true and
fair picture of its financial position.
enriched_requirements.object: and profit and loss account reflect true and fair picture of its financial position

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Instances of window dressing of financials, short provisioning, misclassification of
NPAs, under-reporting / incorrect computation of exposure / risk weight, incorrect
capitalisation of expenses, capitalisation of interest on NPAs, deliberate inflation
of asset and liabilities at the end of the financial year and subsequent reversal
immediately in next financial year, etc., shall be viewed seriously and appropriate
penal action in terms of the provisions of the BR Act, 1949 shall be considered.
enriched_requirements.object: appropriate penal action in terms of the provisions of the BR Act, 1949 shall be considered

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the repeal of these directions,
instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
a.
enriched_requirements.object: affect: a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
<image>
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
For Banks incorporated outside India Capital (i) The amount brought in by banks by way of start-up capital as prescribed by RBI should be shown under this head.
enriched_requirements.object: head

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Others *
Total
* In case there is any unadjusted balance of loss the same may be shown under this item with appropriate foot-note.
enriched_requirements.object: item with appropriate foot-note

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Miscellaneous Income
Total
Note: Under items II to V loss figures shall be shown in brackets
